title: More Armor Trim Materials
description: The datapack adds over 100 new trim materials to the game, plus a way to make them glow in the dark!
body:
# This Datapack adds over 100 new armor trim materials to the game! 
There's both glowing and non-glowing variants of every material.
![List of all trims + their material](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02297544e34ee50ce984c4d0f7345b7eec612e5c.png)

There's over 136 MILLION armor trim combinations on Netherite Armor alone, so play around with the different ones and find something that speaks to you!

![Some example color combos with the Silence trim.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7572c96819160c732848146798c448af04559ef4.gif)

<details>

Unlike many trim material packs, this lets you use apply your trims the same way you always would with vanilla items, with the smithing table. This functionality does come with a slight caveat however, that if you add this datapack into an existing world, some items may not stack with ones they should, the fix is easy though; Just pick up the pre-existing stack and drag it in your inventory. Once it's been inside your inventory, it should update and become stackable with eveything else like normal! This won't be required if you use this datapack from the start of a world, as all items should be converted immediately.

![Smithing a Dyed Leather Helmet using A Nether Star and the Flow Pattern](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ba05382655e4fe10652a311c6c0c00de2c20cd1.png)

To make the trims glow, all you need to do is wear the armor you want to make emissive, and use this item; The Glowing Trim Dye!

![Crafting Recipe for Glowing Trim Dye](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec984ec129e6b35d5da08c190ba4eaa8741eacce.png)

Glowing dyed armor trims keep their color, so you don't have to worry about any extra changes to the materials you love, they simply make the trim glow in the dark!
If you decide however, that you don't want your trims to glow, you can do the exact same process with Muted Trim Dye.

![Crafting Recipe for the Muted Trim Dye](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c597fa9b32d01efb4846a68e349175c8b01ab00b.png)
